en_title: Blizzard Boss Wouldn't Rule Out Overwatch Animated Series, Knows Fans Have Wanted It for Years
cn_title: 暴雪老板：《守望先锋2》动画剧集不排除可能

paragraphs.en: Ever since those initial Overwatch cinematics made their way onto our screens, the prospect of an Overwatch animated series has been an exciting one. For the past decade, rumours of such a thing have come and gone, but there may still be hope.
paragraphs.cn: 自从最初的《守望先锋》动画短片出现在我们的屏幕上以来，《守望先锋》动画剧集一直是粉丝期盼已久的事情。过去十年间，相关传闻时起时落，但希望或许仍未熄灭。

paragraphs.en: In a recent interview, I asked Walter Kong, Overwatch general manager and head of live games and mobile development at Blizzard, if a TV show translation of the hero shooter could still find its way to us. "I would not rule it out," Kong replied.
paragraphs.cn: 在最近一次采访中，我向暴雪《守望先锋》总经理、运营游戏与移动端开发负责人Walter Kong询问：将这款英雄射击游戏改编为电视剧的可能性是否依然存在。「我不会排除这种可能性。」Kong回答。

paragraphs.en: "Every time we release assets, whether it's a hero trailer or an event piece, there are all of these comments about, 'Hey, we would love an Overwatch animated series. Blizzard, what the hell? When's that happening?'" Kong continued. "So we certainly hear that and I think that it is not a huge stretch to believe that there would be a lot of demand for that type of content. So certainly, no, I won't rule out that sometime in the future there could be other storytelling experiences in the Overwatch universe."
paragraphs.cn: 「每当我们发布素材，不管是英雄宣传片还是活动短片，下面总会有这样的评论：『嘿，我们超级想看《守望先锋》动画剧集。暴雪，搞什么？什么时候能出？』」Kong继续说，「所以我们当然听到了这些声音。我认为完全有理由相信，这类内容会有相当大的需求。因此当然，我不排除将来在《守望先锋》宇宙中会出现其他形式的叙事体验。」

paragraphs.en: Blizzard actually did try to get animated shows based on its games off the ground, but those efforts failed. In 2024, Play Nice: The Rise, Fall, and Future of Blizzard Entertainment author Jason Schreier revealed that StarCraft, Overwatch, and Diablo were due the Netflix adaptation treatment, but then Blizzard sued Netflix for poaching the company's Chief Financial Officer. In early 2019, former Blizzard CFO Spencer Neumann was fired after breaching his contract to become CFO of Netflix. It seems this dispute was at the heart of the end of those Netflix adaptations.
paragraphs.cn: 暴雪此前确实曾试图推动旗下游戏改编动画剧集，但相关努力以失败告终。2024年，《Play Nice: The Rise, Fall, and Future of Blizzard Entertainment（暂译《好好玩：暴雪娱乐的兴衰与未来》）》作者Jason Schreier爆料称，《星际争霸》《守望先锋》和《暗黑破坏神》原本都将被Netflix改编，但随后暴雪因Netflix挖走自家首席财务官而提起诉讼。2019年初，前暴雪CFO Spencer Neumann因违反合同条款转投Netflix担任CFO而被解雇。看来正是这场纠纷导致了Netflix改编计划的终结。

paragraphs.en: With Overwatch currently celebrating its 10th anniversary, Blizzard revealed that over 4.4 billion matches have been played in that time, but a hunger for story still remains. This year saw a rethink in how the developer is approaching narrative, with year-long arcs now being told through several seasons. Kong admitted that the studio has always wanted story to be a big part of Overwatch, but bit off more than it could chew back in 2016.
paragraphs.cn: 今年正逢《守望先锋》10周年庆典，暴雪披露这十年内本作累计已进行超过44亿场对局，但玩家对剧情的渴望依然旺盛。今年开发团队对叙事方式进行了重新思考，跨越多个赛季的年度长篇故事线开始展开。Kong承认，工作室一直希望剧情成为《守望先锋》的重要组成部分，但2016年时野心过大、力有不逮。

paragraphs.en: "I think we got the sense that there was this desire to know more about the story of Overwatch, because we had quite a few of the cinematic pieces released before launch," he explained. "I think they helped establish that kind of emotional resonance prior to the games launch, but what we weren't prepared for was being able to support so many ambitions. I think very early on we knew that we wanted the game to have an ongoing release cadence to it and you don't know how hard that's going to be until you actually do it."
paragraphs.cn: 「我想我们当时确实感觉到大家迫切想了解更多《守望先锋》的故事，因为我们在游戏发售前发布了不少动画短片。」Kong解释道，「这些短片在游戏发售前帮助建立了情感共鸣，但我们没有准备好的是——同时支撑那么多野心。我想很早我们就知道希望让游戏保持持续的更新节奏，而你只有真正做了之后，才会知道这有多难。」

paragraphs.en: "And then we also had the ambition to deliver some narrative, some story missions in the game as we showed in 2019 at BlizzCon," Kong continued. "I think we really underestimated the level of resources necessary to hit with all of that ambition. And I would say that by the time that I stepped into the GM role in the latter part of 2021, it was clear to me that there was too much to work on and I had to make some prioritization decisions. Back then we had been in a bit of a content drought and I made a pretty clear call to prioritize getting back to the delivery of live game content in the PVP game, and then I think that is really the story of why we shifted to that Overwatch 2 model."
paragraphs.cn: 「我们当时还有把一些剧情、故事任务做进游戏里的雄心——就像我们在2019年BlizzCon上展示过的那样。」Kong继续说，「我觉得我们确实严重低估了实现所有这些野心所需要的资源。可以这么说，到我在2021年下半年接任总经理职务时，我已经清楚地意识到事情太多，必须做出优先级取舍。当时我们正面临一段内容荒，我做了一个非常明确的决定——把资源优先投入到PVP游戏的运营内容更新上。我想这正是我们后来转向《守望先锋2》模式的根本原因。」

paragraphs.en: "We did give it a try in terms of resuming development of the story missions and releasing the first chapter in Season 6 of 2023. We did get the signal back from players that it really wasn't resonant and I think that's when we made the decision to focus our resources on the core PvP experience and really have stronger definition of what the game would be that we would serve the players that we had and they were enjoying that specific experience."
paragraphs.cn: 「我们确实尝试过重新启动剧情任务的开发，并在2023年的第6赛季推出了第一章。但玩家的反馈是真的没有引起共鸣。我想就是在那个时候，我们决定把资源集中到核心PvP体验上，并对游戏本身要服务什么样的玩家、提供什么样的体验做出了更清晰的定义——而我们的玩家当时正享受着那种特定体验。」

paragraphs.en: Beyond story, though, Kong has ambitions for Overwatch to spread its wings further than the PvP experience that the world is rooted in. Clear signs of this can be seen in the recent collaboration between Blizzard and Epic to bring its heroes into Fortnite, a deal initiated by Kong himself.
paragraphs.cn: 不过除了剧情之外，Kong还有让《守望先锋》走出其PvP体验根基、向外延伸的雄心。这一点在最近暴雪与Epic的合作中已有清晰体现——本次将自家英雄带入《堡垒之夜》的合作，正是由Kong本人发起。

paragraphs.en: "I went to Epic, and part of my history is that I was at Epic from 2018 to 2020, and I worked on the Fortnite team at the time, and I just saw firsthand the positive excitement and energy that could come from surprising collaborations," Kong revealed. "It was something that was positive for Fortnite as well as the partners, the collab partners and I felt that the time was right to just bring a bit of excitement to the overall franchise and perhaps expose our heroes to some new audiences. Quickly we felt that our heroes would be presented in a very positive way and as the work developed, that feeling got reinforced and overall we were very, very happy with how the collaboration delivered."
paragraphs.cn: 「我去找了Epic。我自己有过一段在Epic工作的经历——2018年到2020年，我曾在《堡垒之夜》团队工作，亲眼见证了那种意外联动所能带来的正面兴奋感与能量。」Kong透露，「这对《堡垒之夜》、对合作方都是好事。我感觉时机已经成熟，可以为整个《守望先锋》IP注入一些新鲜活力，也许还能让我们的英雄触达一批新观众。我们很快就感受到我们的英雄会以非常正面的方式呈现，随着合作推进，这种感觉得到了进一步印证。总体而言，我们对此次合作的呈现效果非常非常满意。」

paragraphs.en: It was a long time coming, said Kong, who harboured long-held desires for Overwatch's most beloved characters to exist outside of their hero shooter bubble. "That has been the ambition pretty much from the beginning, but I felt that it could not be done until the core game experience of Overwatch was at a certain level of health and ability to serve our players was at the right place," Kong added.
paragraphs.cn: Kong表示，这一切早就该做了——他长久以来都怀有让《守望先锋》最受欢迎的角色走出英雄射击游戏壁垒的愿望。「这从一开始几乎就是我们的雄心，但我觉得这件事必须要等《守望先锋》核心游戏体验达到一定的健康水平、能够妥善服务玩家时才能去做。」Kong补充道。

paragraphs.en: "I didn't think that pushing on these type of opportunities prematurely would be the right thing to do. I'm very happy with the leaders on our team and the energy and passion they bring to leading the game, which meant that I could spend more time looking to the future and working on initiatives that take a long time to fully realize. I would say that we are seeing some of that early work come to fruition, but there's a lot more of it that I still want to complete and nothing that I should really talk about right now."
paragraphs.cn: 「我不认为过早推进这类合作是正确的做法。我对团队的负责人非常满意——他们带着饱满的能量和热情在领导这款游戏，这意味着我可以花更多时间放眼未来，去推动那些需要长时间才能完整落地的项目。我可以说，我们已经看到一些早期工作开始结果，但还有很多我想要完成的工作，目前没什么具体可以谈的。」

paragraphs.en: Could one of those things be the aforementioned animated series? We'll just have to wait and see. For now, Kong is "happy with where the game is today," after Overwatch ditched the 2 and refocused its efforts on what made it the smash hit it once was. Blizzard will be hoping that momentum keeps up over the next months and years.
paragraphs.cn: 其中是否就包括前面提到的动画剧集呢？我们只能拭目以待。眼下，Kong对「游戏目前的状态感到满意」——《守望先锋》摘掉了「2」的后缀，重新把精力聚焦在让它当年成为爆款的核心体验上。暴雪希望这股势头能在接下来的数月乃至数年中延续下去。
